plan.note: PLAN: resolve open-q#2 (chapter input = minimal ordered CurriculumLevel[] built from local verdicts + GDOS; P6/P10 adopt/version). Four criteria: Cognitive Structural Mapping, Cross-Chapter Degradation, Curiosity Progression, Graduation Assessment. Isolated in src/eval/macro/, consumes verdicts as data, no sim re-run. src/eval/macro/Curriculum.ts + unit test; extend EvalIsolation for macro.

anchor.note: ANCHOR: validateCurriculum(chapter,opts)->MacroVerdict{4 criteria + overallPass}; pure over CurriculumLevel[].

implement.note: IMPLEMENT: src/eval/macro/Curriculum.ts + test/unit/Curriculum.test.ts + macro-isolation scan in EvalIsolation

verify.note: VERIFY: 240/240 green (+9). Healthy chapter passes 4 criteria; each criterion fails on targeted defect; broken level fails health; macro import-isolation scan green; determinism.

integrate.note: INTEGRATE: PKG +eval/macro/curriculum hash s4-f6c7d8; ledger dm-0029; REQ-140/142 IN_PROGRESS.
